title: New maintained fork of this package
author: goela268
body:
Hey folks.

This package is abandoned, as the maintainer confirmed us by mail. The original author no longer works at The Next Web B.V.
A few weeks ago we have created a fork of this package, which we released to Packagist last week. We intend to maintain it long term.

Key differences include:

- Removed passgenerator storage driver, instead you can use a more flexible storage by using config / env values
- Removed obsolete code
- added Laravel 12 support
- added comprehensive docs and troubleshooting section for a common OpenSSL 3 problem

In the future, we intend to add more features & tests, update the package for new versions of Laravel and give back to the open source community. If you have any feature requests, please let us know in the issues of our forked repository.

You can find our fork here: 
https://github.com/byte5digital/laravel-passgenerator

It should be relatively straightforward to replace the package with ours.

Cheers,
Laurent from byte5 GmbH

title: This package is outdates
author: SebastianBotez
body:
There are many problems with openssl 3.
I suggest to write a note when visiting it that says it's abadoned. Spend 3 hours debugging the error error:0308010C:digital envelope routines::unsupported

Lost my nerves.

title: Links in backFields dont open
author: cjonstrup
body:
Thanks for creating such a great library!

I’m trying to add links to the backFields of my Wallet pass, but the links don’t open the web browser as expected. Could you provide an example of how to properly configure a link in the backFields so it functions correctly?

Thanks in advance for your help!

title: Add capability to add localization files
author: mehdmhd
body:
Hello, I didn't find a solution to add multiple localization files with this package.

However, I saw `addLocalizedAssets` function was not implemented in PassGenerator.php file. 

Are there any plans to implement this soon ? 

 Thanks.

title: Pass working on version 0.2.5 but same pass generated on latest version 0.5.0 does not work.
author: sabinefleet
body:
We created the .pkpass file with exact same code on 2 versions 0.2.5 and 0.5.0 with exact same certificate configurations for Apple. Both the .pkpass files are valid on pkpassvalidator website as well.

However, pass created on version 0.2.5 loads on iPhone but pass created on version 0.5.0 does not load on iPhone. 

Error on Chrome: "Sorry, your Pass cannot be installed to Passbook at this time". 
Error on Safari: "Safari cannot download this file".

Is there any resolution? Thank you in advance.

title: Error on generate .pkpass
author: ramos-developer
body:
Hello, we have version 0.3.2 and occasionally we receive several consecutive errors.

error on pass generate, order: League\Flysystem\FileNotFoundException: File not found at path: b4605f76-3dc6-4b27-944e-2770bba99d88/b4605f76-3dc6-4b27-944e-2770bba99d88.pkpass in /var/www/html/vendor/league/flysystem/src/Filesystem.php:390 

error on pass generate, order: ErrorException: rmdir(/var/www/html/storage/app/b4605f76-3dc6-4b27-944e-2770bba99d88): No such file or directory in /var/www/html/vendor/league/flysystem/src/Adapter/Local.php:420 

 error on pass generate, order: ErrorException: ZipArchive::addFile(): No such file or directory in /var/www/html/vendor/thenextweb/passgenerator/src/PassGenerator.php:444 

error on pass generate, order: ErrorException: ZipArchive::close(): Renaming temporary file failed: No such file or directory in /var/www/html/IkonoXperience/vendor/thenextweb/passgenerator/src/PassGenerator.php:457 

We generate the file at the same time it is ready to be downloaded

These errors occur at the same time one after another, so we understand that they are related.
I hope you can help us

Thanks

title: AppleWDRCA Failed to open stream error
author: khrelian
body:
I ran into a problem while trying to use your package. I followed the instructions in the README file, but I got the following error message:

"file_get_contents(AppleWDRCA.pem): Failed to open stream: No such file or directory"

It seems that the package is having trouble finding the "AppleWDRCA.pem" file. I checked and the file is present in my root directory, and I set these to my .env file:

CERTIFICATE_PATH=Certificates.p12
CERTIFICATE_PASS=pass.cer
WWDR_CERTIFICATE=AppleWDRCA.pem

**all the files are present and are located in my root.


Can you help me figure out what's going on and how to fix it? Do I need to install any dependencies or do anything else to get the package to work properly?

Thanks for your help!

title: Add support for Laravel 10
author: peukerjonathan
body:
Currently it is not possible to use the package with Laravel 10.
Composer is giving

```
  Problem 1
    - thenextweb/passgenerator[v0.3, ..., v0.3.2] require illuminate/support ^7.0|^8.0|^9.0 -> satisfiable by illuminate/support[v7.0.0, ..., v7.30.6, v8.0.0, ..., v8.83.27, v9.0.0, ..., v9.52.0].
    - Only one of these can be installed: illuminate/support[v6.0.0, ..., v6.20.44, v7.0.0, ..., v7.30.6, v8.0.0, ..., v8.83.27, v9.0.0, ..., v9.52.0, v10.0.0], laravel/framework[v10.0.0]. laravel/framework replaces illuminate/support and thus cannot coexist with it.
    - illuminate/support[v7.0.0, ..., v7.28.4] require php ^7.2.5 -> your php version (8.1.6) does not satisfy that requirement.
    - illuminate/support[v8.0.0, ..., v8.11.2] require php ^7.3 -> your php version (8.1.6) does not satisfy that requirement.
    - Root composer.json requires laravel/framework ^10.0 -> satisfiable by laravel/framework[v10.0.0].
    - Root composer.json requires thenextweb/passgenerator ^0.3 -> satisfiable by thenextweb/passgenerator[v0.3, v0.3.1, v0.3.2].

```

An update of the dependencies would be highly appreciated!

title: Laravel 9 support
author: stepanenko3

title: Support for multiple passes
author: gbkwiatt
body:
Would be nice to get support for multiple passes
https://developer.apple.com/documentation/walletpasses/distributing_and_updating_a_pass

> Provide a bundle of passes to enable your user to download multiple passes at once. To create the pass bundle:
Create a .zip file containing the .pkpass files for the passes that are part of the bundle.
Change the extension of the .zip file to .pkpasses.
You can distribute a bundle of passes the same way you distribute a single pass. The MIME type for a bundle of passes is "application/vnd.apple.pkpasses".
